seoTitle: Ravensdale vs Ravenswood — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ravensdale and Ravenswood. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ravensdale and Ravenswood.
heading: Ravensdale vs Ravenswood — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ravensdale, New South Wales and Ravenswood, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ravenswood has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Ravensdale (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ravensdale or Ravenswood safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ravensdale has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Ravenswood scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ravensdale scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Ravenswood scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ravensdale or Ravenswood?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ravenswood has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
